utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. Checking the final coverage plan: all 5 items are present. Each section includes the relevant details requested: health_coverage specifies both physical and mental health insurance with costs; property_coverage includes home/contents-like protection with costs; travel_coverage details travel insurance coverage and costs; additional_services includes enhancement services with costs; total_budget gives a complete monthly/annual breakdown. All are fully specified according to the format.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan describes comprehensive physical and mental health coverage, professional property protection, global travel coverage with adventure sports, and additional services such as telemedicine and volunteer work coverage. To map these to ground-truth ratings, I looked for the closest matching plans and service names in the ground-truth dataset. The health coverage aligns with the 'InsurePlus Standard Plan' for physical health (rating 10) and 'CareCo Basic Plan' for mental health (rating 10), as these are identified as ideal in the ideal_insurance_profile. The property coverage corresponds to 'InsurePlus Standard Coverage' (rating 10) under property_protection. The travel coverage includes global adventure and business travel protection, matching 'InsurePlus Standard Plan' (rating 10) for travel insurance, plus the 'Adventure Travel Coverage' (rating 10) add-on. The plan explicitly mentions telemedicine and digital health services, which map to 'Telemedicine Services' (rating 10). Therefore, each main element in the final plan corresponds to these top-rated options.
